title: Switzerland rejects population growth, shows forecasts
summary: Switzerland has rejected a proposal to increase the population, with forecasts suggesting the country's population will continue to grow.

title: Vandalism and arrests during Knicks celebration in New York
summary: Vandalism and multiple arrests were reported during a celebration in New York after the Knicks won a game.

title: UK seizes Russian oil tanker
summary: The UK has seized a Russian oil tanker, reportedly in response to Russia's actions in Ukraine.

title: Former minister Torsten Schack Pedersen quits politics after 21 years
summary: Former Danish minister Torsten Schack Pedersen has announced his retirement from politics after 21 years of service.

title: DR Congo reports over 700 confirmed Ebola cases
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo has reported over 700 confirmed cases of Ebola, a significant increase in recent weeks.
